    Note l'ensemble solution de chacune des inéquations.
    \begin{tasks}
        \task $x \ge -3$
        \task $x \le 4$
        \task $x \ge 2$
        \task $x \le -4$
        %
        \task $0x \le 0$
        \task $0x \ge -1$
        \task $0x < -2$
        \task $0x > 0$
